title: Update Rows with JOIN in MySQL
summary: Fill missing row values in MySQL from a lookup table with UPDATE and JOIN.
verification_setup: Ensure mysql, mysqladmin, and mysqld are available on PATH.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Python 3.9.6 and MySQL 8.4.0 on macOS. The tests start a temporary MySQL instance with local mysql binaries, then verify matching updates, preservation of existing values, unmatched rows, repeated category updates, and the empty-lookup case.
